Who is fl0m ? For the blind, he is the new Tesla. For the hungarians, he is the chef. For the thirsty, he is the wet. If fl0m thinks, I am also a frog. If fl0m speaks, I’m yet again a frog. If fl0m has one fan, it blows cold air. If fl0m has no fans, it will be hot.

If tomatoes are a fruit then is ketchup a smoothie. Not only that, but salsa is fruit salad. lasagna is just pizza flavoured cake. Popcorn is a vegetable. Is a pop tart ravioli? Is cereal a soup? How many holes does a straw have? If you’re in a competition by yourself, do you come in first or last? If I hit myself and it hurts, am I weak or strong? If time is money, is an ATM a time machine? and the ultimate question, If you’re bald, what hair color do they put on your license?

The year is 2042, I reminisce to the day when fl0m played Battlefield 2042 back in 2024 with the Variety Crew, I ask the question in chat "What do you guys think you’ll be doing in 2042?” knowing my answer was going to be still watching fl0m. A few weeks later, I wait in offline chat for almost four hours waiting for fl0m to go live, waiting to hear the sweet sound of Europa by Isenberg from the intro music. He never went live that day, or the day after that, I'm still waiting.

It's prestigious. It's sexy. It's hot. Mythic.
